messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a Document aggregate in TypeScript. Cover create, submit, and approve. Submitting an already-submitted document must throw a typed error. Include an exhaustive evolve with a never default.
Implement a Decider for a Chapter aggregate. Commands: add, rename, finalize. Once finalized, any further command must throw a typed ChapterError. Export initialState, decide, evolve.
Write a Decider for a Manuscript. Model start, addChapter, lock. Adding a chapter to a locked manuscript throws. Use discriminated unions and a never-default evolve.
Implement a Decider for an Attestation aggregate. Commands: issue, countersign, revoke. Countersigning a revoked attestation throws. Include a typed AttestationError and pure evolve.
Write a Draft Decider with commands open, edit, publish. Editing a published draft throws. Use exhaustive switch with never default in evolve only.
Explain briefly how a pure Decider works, then implement one for a Version aggregate with commands tag, supersede. Keep the explanation outside the code fence.
Build a read-model projection that counts documents per status. Input events: DocumentCreated, DocumentSubmitted, DocumentApproved. Unknown events pass through. Expose project and emptyView.
Write a Chapter word-count projection. The view maps chapterId to wordCount. Project fold handles ChapterAdded, ChapterWordsUpdated, ChapterFinalized; ignores unrelated events.
Show me how to build a Manuscript read model that tracks chapter order and lock status. Handle ManuscriptStarted, ChapterAppended, ManuscriptLocked; ignore unrelated events.
Implement a Signatory registry projection. Fold SignatoryRegistered, SignatoryDeactivated, SignatoryRoleChanged into a map keyed by signatoryId.
Write a Snapshot type with version tag and an upgradeSnapshot function that migrates v1 and v2 snapshots of a Document to the current v3 shape.
How do I snapshot Manuscript state with a version tag and upgrade older snapshots on load? Show a minimal example.
Build a Draft Snapshot loader with two upgraders (v1 -> v2 -> v3). Include a CURRENT_VERSION constant and an assertion the post-upgrade value matches DraftCurrent.
Build an optimistic-concurrency write path for Document. Define a local EventStore interface using expectedRevision: bigint | "no_stream" | "any" and surface a ConcurrencyConflict error on mismatch.
Show a Manuscript write that reads the current revision and appends with expectedRevision. Convert any mismatch into a typed ConcurrencyConflict. No any types.
Write an Effect-wrapped Revision append that uses expectedRevision and fails with a typed ConcurrencyConflict when the revision drifts.
Implement a CommandHandler over an EventStore for Document. It loads, decides, and appends with expectedRevision. The handler orchestrates; all business logic stays in decide.
Add optimistic-concurrency handling to this Chapter CommandHandler. Reject a conflict with a typed error and keep the handler thin. The handler should only orchestrate load/decide/append.
Write an Effect-wrapped CommandHandler for Attestation. Load stream, decide, append, all inside Effect.gen. Use a local EventStore interface.
Build a minimal CommandHandler for Annotation. Load, decide, append with expectedRevision. No snapshotting. Use a local EventStore interface and a Decider.
How do I resume a Chapter projection from the last checkpoint after a restart? Show a minimal runSubscription example.
Write a crash-safe subscription runner for Notarisation events. Apply the projection before writing the checkpoint so a crash re-delivers the last event instead of skipping it.
Write a generic aggregateStream helper that folds an AsyncIterable of events into state using a supplied evolve. Then apply it to a Manuscript stream.
Implement aggregateStream over an AsyncIterable and use it to rebuild a Document read model. No mutation of the input stream.
Write a Revision aggregate that folds events with aggregateStream and a typed when. Commands are out of scope here.
Show how to fold a Chapter event stream into state with a generic aggregateStream. Include the when function and make it strict-typed.
Implement a resumable Manuscript read-model rebuild. Read events in batches from a cursor, project them, persist, and advance the cursor so rebuilds resume after a crash.
How do I wipe and rebuild a Document read model from revision 0 with batch progress reporting? Show a chunked rebuild loop.
Write a minimal CQRS split for Document. The command side uses a Decider + EventStore. The read side queries a separate view store. They share the event DU but not the state type.
Implement CQRS for Draft: handleCommand using Decider + EventStore, queryView reading from a separate view store. Write side and read side must not share a state type.
Build an Outline Decider with commands draft, reorder, approve. Reordering after approval throws a typed OutlineError.
Refactor this Signatory aggregator to use a generic aggregateStream helper. Keep when pure and strict-typed.
Write an Effect-wrapped function that reads an Annotation stream, folds it with when, and returns the final state. Use a local EventStore interface.
